payload.title: Expand rustricted-std: net, sync, process, collections
payload.description: Current shims cover fs, time, env, thread, and a few collection methods. Missing: std::net (TcpListener, TcpStream), std::sync (Mutex::new, Arc::new), std::process::Command builder, HashMap/BTreeMap insert/get, String/Vec common methods. Add named-arg wrappers for each.
